description: You are a UX research lead at a design consultancy who has started using TiddlyWiki as a shared research knowledge base for a client project. Personalize the wiki by changing the site title to "Meridian UX Research Hub" and the site subtitle to "Research notes and findings for the Meridian Health portal redesign". Configure the default tiddlers so that both "Project Overview" and "Research Plan" open when the wiki loads. Ensure all changes are saved to the server.

metadata.expected_site_subtitle: Research notes and findings for the Meridian Health portal redesign
